title: Clint Freeland
compiled_truth: Clint Freeland is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-20 to 2002-03-08), Clint Freeland sent 36 and received 215 emails, totalling 251 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (33), [Jeff Nogid](people/jeff-nogid) (16), [Jim Armogida](people/jim-armogida) (13), [Ryan Siurek](people/ryan-siurek) (5), [Rex Rogers](people/rex-rogers) (5).
